text:
I need you to fix our config. in a seperate conversation you helped me combine codex information from my repo to my local config. but this messed everything up. i'd like you to fix it.I already symlinked but i think we made a mistake with .codex
I didn't mean to keep any parts of omarchy version of the config at the beginning. i meant to take and combine the best parts of the wsl2 .codex, and combine with our local machines codex config.

you can still find the old local config in our backups and you can still see the current wsl2 codex config. please redo it because our current codex_home has skills specific to a project which tells me we did it wrong
